## Learning to Refocus with Video Diffusion Models

This skill implements techniques from the paper: Learning to Refocus with Video Diffusion Models

### Core Concept

This paper presents a novel approach to solving important problems in machine learning and AI. The key innovation involves advanced methods that improve existing techniques.

https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.19823
